caption: A screen recording of a virtual meeting displays a shared digital workspace and small video feeds of participants. The main workspace features a dark background with circular nodes and connecting lines, centered around a graphic of green leaves with the word "SHARE" written in white capital letters. Small profile icons, including one of a person with dark hair and glasses, are positioned around this central image. At the top of the screen, several browser tabs are open, with titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemini," "Convents by Systemini," and "Future of Society by Systemini." In the top right, a video feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt. Throughout the clip, the screen remains largely static, with the man in the video feed occasionally shifting his position and expression while looking toward the camera.
